title: Alignment
pickOne: **Evil** - Kill a defenseless or surrendered enemy.

title: Race
pickOne: **Dwarf** - You ignore the clumsy tag on any armor you wear.

**Orc** - Add the following option to **War Leader**, and you may use this option once per battle without spending hold: 
- Fall upon the enemy in a violent, howling frenzy.
**Human** - Hirelings under your command have +1 Loyalty.

title: War Leader (+CHA)
description:
You can rally warriors to your banner at any time there are suitable people available for you to recruit or lead. When you **rally a war-band together**, they will fight for you for one battle, though they will demand a cut of any loot in exchange. The war-band's strength, equipment, and bearing will be proportionate to the quality of the warriors available, as well as your level.

When you **lead your war-band into battle**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: Hold 3. Over the course of the fight, spend a hold to make your war-band:
bullets: Make a strong assault
Stand firm against a strong assault
Make an organized retreat
Show mercy to their defeated enemies
Hold fast despite fear or danger
Restore discipline and form ranks after a lapse or break

outcomes.text: Hold 1 anyway, but there will be hell to pay afterwards.

submoves.title: Aftermath
submoves.description: After the battle, assuming your war-band is still fit for duty, you may spend a hold to call them together and follow you into another battle. If you don't, they disperse afterwards.

title: Tactician (+WIS)
description: When you **use your knowledge of tactics, discipline, and strategy on the battlefield**, roll Wisdom

outcomes.text: You do it, no problem.  Describe how you accomplish one of the following:
bullets: Create an advantage; you or an ally takes +1 forward when you exploit it
Disengage from melee with one enemy
Avoid a hazard on the battlefield without **Defying Danger**
Block a blow meant for you or someone else nearby, you take half damage
Shake off the effects of fear, confusion, or being stunned

outcomes.text: You still get your desired effect (above), but you also expose yourself to danger, retribution, or cost.

title: All For One, and One For All
description: When you **Aid an ally in battle**, on a hit, in addition to giving them +1, choose one of the following:

bullets: They take +1d4 damage forward
They take +2 armor forward

title: Battlefield Strategy
description: When you **Spout Lore** **about a military unit or situation you have observed**, you may roll with WIS instead of INT. The first person acting on your information takes +1 forward.

title: Call to Arms
description: When you **Recruit**, also pick options equal to your CHA:

bullets: You may **Carouse** in town before leaving without spending coins
Any hirelings you recruit have the cost "blind patriotism" instead of their usual cost
One hireling you recruit gets an additional skill point
You requisition a piece of equipment from the locals

outcomes.text: Only one of them is true, GM's choice.

title: Crusader
description: Gain a non-multiclass move from the paladin playbook, except Quest.

title: Flanking Maneuver
description: When you **Aid** an ally in battle, on a hit, you give them both options from **All For One, And One For All**.

title: For the Cause
description: When you **rally a war-band**, the GM will tell you something they will accept in lieu of a cut of any loot:

bullets: Vengeance
Glory
Renown
The greater good

title: Hold the Line
description: While you are **standing side by side with your allies on the front lines of battle**, you may **Defend** with CHA instead of CON.

title: Reconnaissance
description: When you **send your war-band to scout a dangerous place** for you, you may **Discern Realities** about the place as if you were there.

title: Stentorian Voice
description: You can give **Aid** to anyone who can hear you with inspiring words, strategic advice, or grisly threats, as long as you are within shouting distance.

title: Tactical Eye
description: When you **survey a battlefield or dangerous environment**, ask the GM two of the following questions. The GM will answer truthfully.

bullets: Is there a trap or ambush here, and if so, where?
Where is the best place to make a defensive stand?
Where is the best place to attack from?
What here is the biggest threat to me?

title: Watch Duty
description: When you **organize your camp's defenses**, everyone takes +1 to **Take Watch**.

title: Drill Sergeant (Requires level 6+)
description: As long as you're around, no NPCs under your command will have discipline problems. A hard glare or a sharp rebuke from you will snap them back into line or banish any fear from them, and your war-band will never rout on your watch.

title: Field Logistics (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **Undertake a Perilous Journey**, everyone takes +1 to their roles.

title: Fingerspitzengefühl (Requires level 6+)
description: When you use **Tactician**, on a hit you may also immediately ask one question from the **Discern Realities** list.

title: Lordly Caliber (Requires level 6+)
description: When you use **War Leader**, you get +1 hold, even on a miss, and add the following choices to the list:

bullets: Bring magical support to a situation
Fight and die to the last without fear

title: Paragon (Requires level 6+)
description: Gain a non-multiclass move from the paladin playbook, except Quest.

title: Reconnaissance-By-Force (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Reconnaissance**

When you use **Reconnaissance**, on a hit, the war-band provides an additional service for you; choose one:

bullets: They make the enemy break formation or reveal a vulnerability
They make a hidden enemy or threat reveal itself
They distract, lure away, or sabotage the first foe they encounter

title: Shield Wall (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Hold the Line**

You and all allies in your presence get +1 hold when they **Defend**, even on a 6-.

title: Tactical Commander (Requires level 6+)
description: When you use **Tactician**, you may apply your chosen effects to your war-band instead of you, as long as you are present to command them.

title: Turn the Tables (Requires level 6+)
description: Add the following options to **Tactician**:

bullets: Escape from a dangerous position
Lure or push an enemy into a bad position for them

title: War Stories (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **share tales of glorious battles with your comrades**, lose any hold on this move and roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: Hold 1 anyway, but there will be trouble when it is spent.

submoves.title: Spend Hold
submoves.description: Anyone may spend a hold from this move to immediately make the **Tactician** move, rolling for it as usual with their own WIS and taking +1 to the roll.
